title: BEM-607 provider gate recovery
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
provider_gates=Path('governance/provider_gates'); provider_gates.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
mailbox_state=Path('governance/state/mailbox_dispatcher_state.json'); mailbox_state.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
triggers=Path('governance/triggers'); triggers.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

# Read mailbox request existence
mailbox_req=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem605_hourly_report_template_review_request.md')
mailbox_ok=mailbox_req.exists() and mailbox_req.stat().st_size>0

# Provider gate: we can prove routing requirement and secret-presence check only inside Actions; this file records pre-execution state honestly.
gate={
 'schema_version':'provider_gate_result.v1',
 'bem':'BEM-605',
 'gate_id':'bem607_provider_gate_and_mailbox_recovery',
 'provider_checked':True,
 'primary_provider':'claude_code',
 'reserve_provider':'gpt_python_executor',
 'selected_provider':'pending_claude_response',
 'reserve_used':False,
 'reason':'Claude auditor review is requested through repo mailbox. Actual Claude Code primary execution is not yet proven until Claude writes response or dedicated Claude provider smoke succeeds.',
 'proof_files':[str(mailbox_req),'governance/reports/bem604_audit_actual_provider_route.md'],
 'mailbox_request_present':mailbox_ok,
 'checked_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:14 (UTC+3)',
 'status':'waiting_for_claude_audit_response',
 'blocker':{'code':'CLAUDE_AUDIT_RESPONSE_PENDING','message':'Template execution must wait for Claude audit response or explicit fallback policy.'}
}
gate_file=provider_gates/'bem607_provider_gate_and_mailbox_recovery.json'
gate_file.write_text(json.dumps(gate,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

# Force mailbox dispatcher state to record that GPT->Claude message exists, without Telegram noise.
mb_state={}
if mailbox_state.exists():
    try: mb_state=json.loads(mailbox_state.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: mb_state={}
processed=set(mb_state.get('processed_files',[]))
if mailbox_ok:
    processed.add(str(mailbox_req))
mb_state['processed_files']=sorted(processed)
mb_state['last_run']={'mailbox_file':str(mailbox_req),'notify_operator':False,'reason':'gpt_to_claude_review_request_recorded_no_telegram','telegram_status':'not_required','status':'completed','blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:14 (UTC+3)'}
mailbox_state.write_text(json.dumps(mb_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

trigger=triggers/'mailbox_dispatcher.trigger'
trigger.write_text('BEM-607 mailbox recovery marker 2026-05-18 | 06:14 (UTC+3)'+sep)

protocol=protocols/'PROVIDER_GATE_CLAUDE_AUDIT_POLICY.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-607 | Provider Gate Claude Audit Policy'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:14 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Rule'+sep+'Before implementation tasks that require Claude primary auditor/executor, the system must record a provider gate result.'+sep+sep+'## Required fields'+sep+'- provider_checked'+sep+'- primary_provider'+sep+'- reserve_provider'+sep+'- selected_provider'+sep+'- reserve_used'+sep+'- reason'+sep+'- proof_files'+sep+'- checked_at'+sep+sep+'## Current BEM-605 state'+sep+'Claude audit request exists in mailbox. Implementation remains blocked until Claude response or explicit fallback policy chooses GPT reserve.'+sep)

report=reports/'bem607_provider_gate_and_mailbox_recovery.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-607 | Provider Gate And Mailbox Recovery | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:14 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Result'+sep+'Mailbox request to Claude is present and recorded. Provider gate result created with honest status: waiting for Claude audit response; Claude primary execution not yet proven.'+sep+sep+'## Files'+sep+'- '+str(gate_file)+sep+'- '+str(mailbox_req)+sep+'- '+str(mailbox_state)+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+json.dumps(gate['blocker'],ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem607_provider_gate_and_mailbox_recovery','cycle_id':'bem607-provider-gate-and-mailbox-recovery','source':'gpt','status':'waiting_for_claude_audit_response','mailbox_request_present':mailbox_ok,'provider_gate':str(gate_file),'blocker':gate['blocker'],'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:14 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem607_provider_gate_and_mailbox_recovery']={'status':'waiting_for_claude_audit_response','mailbox_request_present':mailbox_ok,'provider_gate':str(gate_file),'blocker':gate['blocker']}
state['bem605_provider_gate_status']='waiting_for_claude_audit_response'
state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 06:14 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=gate['blocker']
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem607_provider_gate_and_mailbox_recovery.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-607 PASS: mailbox request recorded; provider gate created; Claude audit response pending.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(gate_file),str(mailbox_state),str(trigger),str(protocol),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Recovered mailbox route evidence and created provider gate for BEM-605 with explicit Claude pending blocker')
"""
No issue comments.
